Welcome to Pitch Mastery. Up to now, I've given you some videos on frame control and pricing. These tools were developed to get buyers interested in complex ideas and to close deals. Now it's time for you to get access to the whole strong system. In Pitch Mastery, Strong is divided into six video modules which you can see at the top left of the homepage. This is where you should get started right now. I put this together for you for one reason, to make the truth as interesting to others as it is to you. Although you and I have just started working together, we share really one commonality, right? The people we sell to expect us to give a truly great pitch. We're supposed to be able to describe what we have in a captivating, interesting, and provocative way in a narrative. Yeah, of course, we're supposed to be purveyors of facts and information to describe features and benefits and give written proof about our company and our products. But we're also supposed to be business people who tell particularly interesting stories about the financial future of our product, our company, and our idea. When we don't live up to that responsibility, we don't close deals. In this, you and I, our interests are interwoven with every storyteller who ever lived. We're modern, well-educated, computerized, savvy, and still, we're no different from men and women who wandered from one village to another in ancient Greece, for example, telling the story of Odysseus, who was driven by storms across the seas, and Icarus, who flew too close to the sun on wings of wax. Right? From their time to ours, the challenges of doing deals have never changed. The questions are still the same. What elements make a narrative interesting? How can the attention of the audience be seized instantly? How should the description of what we need to sell be shaped to hold the buyer's interest? And what can be done to nail it into memory? We learn too little about all this. We learn spreadsheets and product specifications and features and benefits, but not much about what drives human emotion and human decisions, and how the social animal in us responds to business economics and to offers to exchange value with another person. The training will prepare you with tools, techniques, strategies, and scripts that you need to make your product a pleasure to hear about and easy to tell others about and to buy all supply everything you need to make your ideas vivid and truly alive to transform superficial business chatter into a narrative with the power to strike deeply into the buyer's consciousness. Yeah, I mean, the buyers require specific information and our first priority is to provide it truthfully. But the buyer has deeper and more universal needs that have to be met at the same time or he'll turn away and leave without taking any action. It takes the buyer a lot of energy to listen to what you are saying. In my experience, nothing is easier than to stop listening about a deal. So as you enter pitch mastery to learn the strong method, you'll start with S for set the frame. Click on S now at the top left, you'll find this module shows you the setup, the establishing shot, the frame that kick starts your story, and it's your frame that is the best way of arousing emotions and conveying information and messages to your buyer. Look, the human brain welcomes a well structured business narrative, but it is likely to reject a dry, fact packed report that fails to grip the imagination. So with S or set the frame, you can ignite desire and wanting. In one of my first lessons as an analyst working in an investment bank trying to get a $20 million company funded, just before entering a room of potential investors, my boss told me, above all else, make it interesting. He said, get their attention and hold it. We can sell this deal if you get and keep their attention long enough. That is the first and greatest commandment of pitch anything and pitch mastery. And it is what this training is all about. There's a lot of material in this product. Get through it and you'll raise a million dollars or fund a software company or close the biggest deal of your career. The fastest way to get these skills is to follow the path I've set out. Go through the strong modules, download the worksheets, use the scripts. If you want to learn what I call the way of the sword and you want to learn it as fast as possible, start now with S, set the frame.
